programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Bud's chance at a steady girlfriend is jeopardized by the hosts of a popular college radio show.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: In the 200th episode, clips of past episodes are shown.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: The cast discuss their favorite episodes which we see through clips.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy forces Al to sacrifice a basketball game and spend a torturous evening in conversation with new neighbors, idealistic newlyweds Steve and Marcy Rhoades.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: At the suggestion of her next-door-neighbor Marcy, Peggy goes on a "thinergy" diet in hopes of rekindling the flame in Al.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Sixteen Years And What Do You Get?
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Al, Peggy runs his credit card up to the limit and Al is forced to show up for his sixteenth wedding anniversary empty-handed.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: But I Didn't Shoot The Deputy
programme.desc: Like any red-blooded American, when Al hears a strange sound in the night, he springs to the defense of his home and family and accidentally shoots the neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Have You Driven A Ford Lately?
programme.desc: After Al and Steve restore a '65 Mustang to its former glory, Marcy and Steve can't resist giving it a test run - from the back seat.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Steve and Marcy decide to add on to their house, Al and Peggy have them squabbling over an exercise salon for the girls or a poolroom for the guys.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Peggy insists that Al attend her cousin's wedding, he protests and spends the evening in the bachelor pad of his swinging single co-worker, Luke Ventura.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al refuses to buy Peggy a VCR, Marcy convinces her to get a job and buy one for herself.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Peggy go away for a romantic weekend, Marcy and Steve volunteer to baby-sit for Kelly and Bud and discover that the Bundy children are unlike anything in the childrearing manuals.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Against his better judgement, Steve sits in on a Friday night poker game with Al and ends up losing his entire paycheck.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Gary, the jetset owner of the shoe store where Al works is in a near-fatal plane crash, Al decides that it's time to get some recognition from his boss or quit his job.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Marcy turns into a nervous wreck when an extremely seductive Al keeps popping up in her dreams.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al has to make the difficult choice between honoring his commitments to his children or doing what he really wants to do - namely, attending the final bash at his favorite hamburger joint.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Bud's chance at a steady girlfriend is jeopardized by the hosts of a popular college radio show.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: In the 200th episode, clips of past episodes are shown.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: The cast discuss their favorite episodes which we see through clips.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy forces Al to sacrifice a basketball game and spend a torturous evening in conversation with new neighbors, idealistic newlyweds Steve and Marcy Rhoades.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: At the suggestion of her next-door-neighbor Marcy, Peggy goes on a "thinergy" diet in hopes of rekindling the flame in Al.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: Sixteen Years And What Do You Get?
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Al, Peggy runs his credit card up to the limit and Al is forced to show up for his sixteenth wedding anniversary empty-handed.

programme.sub-title: But I Didn't Shoot The Deputy
programme.desc: Like any red-blooded American, when Al hears a strange sound in the night, he springs to the defense of his home and family and accidentally shoots the neighbor's dog.

programme.sub-title: Have You Driven A Ford Lately?
programme.desc: After Al and Steve restore a '65 Mustang to its former glory, Marcy and Steve can't resist giving it a test run - from the back seat.

programme.desc: When Steve and Marcy decide to add on to their house, Al and Peggy have them squabbling over an exercise salon for the girls or a poolroom for the guys.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Peggy insists that Al attend her cousin's wedding, he protests and spends the evening in the bachelor pad of his swinging single co-worker, Luke Ventura.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al refuses to buy Peggy a VCR, Marcy convinces her to get a job and buy one for herself.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Peggy go away for a romantic weekend, Marcy and Steve volunteer to baby-sit for Kelly and Bud and discover that the Bundy children are unlike anything in the childrearing manuals.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Against his better judgement, Steve sits in on a Friday night poker game with Al and ends up losing his entire paycheck.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Gary, the jetset owner of the shoe store where Al works is in a near-fatal plane crash, Al decides that it's time to get some recognition from his boss or quit his job.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Marcy turns into a nervous wreck when an extremely seductive Al keeps popping up in her dreams.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al has to make the difficult choice between honoring his commitments to his children or doing what he really wants to do - namely, attending the final bash at his favorite hamburger joint.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Bud's chance at a steady girlfriend is jeopardized by the hosts of a popular college radio show.

programme.desc: In the 200th episode, clips of past episodes are shown.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: The cast discuss their favorite episodes which we see through clips.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy forces Al to sacrifice a basketball game and spend a torturous evening in conversation with new neighbors, idealistic newlyweds Steve and Marcy Rhoades.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: With Samantha and Endora's help, Darrin becomes a great golfer -- but almost loses his job.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha brings Halloween pictures to life.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Out Of Sync, Out Of Mind
programme.desc: Aunt Clara tries a spell and throws Samantha's voice out of sync.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: That Was No Chick, That Was My Wife
programme.desc: Samantha's simultaneous appearance in Chicago and New York almost costs Darrin his fob.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Allergic To Ancient Macedonian Dodo Birds
programme.desc: Endora's magic is mysteriously transferred to Aunt Clara.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Aunt Clare zips the Stephens family and Gladys Kravitz to witch-hunting Plymouth on Thanksgiving Day.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darren must accept Endora's help to woo a valuable new client.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: My What Big Ears You Have
programme.desc: When Darrin tries to buy Samantha a surprise gift, Endora accuses him of seeing another woman.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: I Get Your Nannie...You Get My Goat
programme.desc: Annoyed that Darrin has stolen his servant, Lord Montdrako puts a spell on him.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Humbug Not To Be Spoken Here
programme.desc: Samantha reforms a skinflint on Christmas Eve

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Aunt Clara summons the greatest of them all -- Leonard Da Vinci -- to paint the Stephens' house.
